LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF SOFI LENDING CORP'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF SOFI LENDING CORP's Motion For Leave To Amend To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
